tagline: Designing scalable cloud architecture, infrastructure as code, and automated CI/CD pipelines.
description: Senior DevOps and Cloud Engineer with 5+ years of experience designing, deploying, and managing multi-cloud infrastructure across AWS, Azure, and GCP.

roles.detailed: Senior DevOps & Cloud Engineer | Infrastructure as Code | Container Orchestration

bio: Senior DevOps and Cloud Engineer with 5+ years of experience specializing in Infrastructure as Code using Terraform and Ansible, cloud security with IAM, and container orchestration on EKS/AKS/GKE with Helm. Proficient in engineering end-to-end CI/CD pipelines and production observability stacks, delivering up to 50% reduction in deployment times and 25% savings in multi-cloud expenditure.

bullets: Led containerized microservices deployments on AWS EKS and ECS, integrated with automated CI/CD pipelines (Jenkins, GitHub Actions), reducing deployment time by 40-50%.
Designed and managed large-scale AWS infrastructure including EC2, RDS, EFS, Lambda, ECR, Load Balancers, and Secrets Manager across multiple high-availability clusters.
Implemented Infrastructure as Code using Terraform, reducing manual provisioning effort by 60%+ and minimizing configuration drift across AWS, Azure, and GCP environments.
Enforced cloud security and DevSecOps best practices by implementing IAM policies, RBAC, VPC architectures, encryption, vulnerability scanning, and multi-tool monitoring.
Drove cost optimization through tagging strategies, budget alerts, and right-sizing, reducing cloud spend by 15-25% across key workloads.
experience.desc: Multi-cloud infrastructure management, container orchestration, IaC implementation, DevSecOps automation, and cloud cost optimization initiatives.

bullets: Containerized and deployed a GenAI application on Amazon ECS, automating build and release pipelines through CI/CD for stable inference performance.
Managed AWS infrastructure setup for an e-commerce client, including ECS clusters, RDS databases, and load balancers, maintaining 99.9% uptime.
Developed and maintained automation scripts in Bash, Python, Groovy, and YAML for provisioning, configuration management, and pipeline acceleration.
Contributed to a cloud migration project, validating and cleaning CMDB data for multiple clients to enable accurate asset inventory and governance.
experience.desc: Cloud deployment support, GenAI application containerization, pipeline scripting, e-commerce infrastructure management, and cloud migration inventory validation.

bullets: Designed and implemented an IoT-based distance-measuring device integrating sensors, microcontrollers, and cloud data transmission for real-time monitoring.
Developed device communication protocols enabling reliable data transfer between IoT components and cloud endpoints.
experience.desc: IoT hardware integration, sensor microcode development, and cloud data transmission protocol design.

experience.company: C-DAC (Centre for Development of Advanced Computing)
bullets: Worked on live software development projects using PHP and Java in a collaborative environment.
Developed and optimized backend logic and database interactions using MySQL.
Performed automated testing using Selenium to ensure application reliability and functionality.
Collaborated with team members to design, develop, and test web-based applications.
experience.desc: Hands-on experience in full-stack web development, database management, and test automation using PHP, Java, Selenium, and MySQL on live projects.

bullets: Designed and developed an Arduino-based distance measuring device using a custom-built enclosure, integrating sensors for accurate real-time measurements.
Built and configured a custom Raspberry Pi OS environment to support IoT data processing and device communication.
Implemented reliable communication protocols for seamless data transmission between hardware components and cloud endpoints.
experience.desc: IoT hardware prototyping, Arduino-based sensor integration, Raspberry Pi OS customization, and communication protocol development.

projects.title: GenAI Application Deployment
projects.subtitle: ECS Infrastructure & CI/CD
projects.desc: Reduced inference latency by optimizing compute and networking configurations on ECS, achieving stable performance for a production GenAI workload while automating an end-to-end deployment pipeline.

projects.title: Multi-Cloud Infrastructure Automation
projects.subtitle: Reusable IaC Architecture
projects.desc: Implemented reusable Terraform modules for provisioning VPCs, EKS clusters, and RDS instances across multi-cloud environments, cutting provisioning time down to under 30 minutes and enforcing tight RBAC and IAM controls.

projects.title: Observability Stack Implementation
projects.subtitle: Centralized Metrics and Logging
projects.desc: Designed and deployed a full observability stack covering metrics, distributed tracing, and log aggregation for microservices running on EKS, reducing MTTR by over 30% through predictive SLO tracking and dashboards.

projects.title: Online Voting System
projects.subtitle: College Project
projects.desc: Designed and implemented a college-level online voting system enabling efficient, secure, and fair selection of Head Captain and Marshal candidates.

projects.title: Travel & Tourism Booking System
projects.subtitle: Hotel & Trip Management Platform
projects.desc: Designed and developed a web-based travel and tourism booking platform enabling users to explore destinations, book hotels, and manage travel reservations efficiently. Implemented dynamic booking workflows, database-driven hotel listings, and user-friendly interfaces to enhance overall user experience.

publications.title: AWS Certified Solutions Architect
publications.desc: Professional certification validating expertise in designing distributed, cost-optimized, fault-tolerant systems on AWS.

publications.title: Google Cloud Digital Leader & Azure Fundamentals
publications.desc: Core fundamental cloud architectural validation spanning GCP core cloud concepts and Microsoft Azure platform structures (AZ-900).

publications.title: Microsoft Azure Fundamentals
publications.desc: Gained foundational knowledge of Microsoft Azure cloud services, including core concepts of cloud computing, Azure architecture, pricing models, governance, and security. Demonstrated understanding of key services such as compute, networking, storage, and identity management aligned with AZ-900 certification.

publications.title: AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner
publications.desc: Achieved AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner certification, demonstrating strong understanding of AWS core services, cloud architecture principles, security best practices, and cost optimization strategies across global cloud infrastructure.

publications.title: Multi-Cloud Infrastructure Automation
publications.desc: Modular provisioning using Terraform across AWS, Azure, and GCP, Docker, Rhel, Vmware cluster governance via Helm, and service mesh routing configurations.

publications.title: Production Observability & DevSecOps Systems
publications.desc: Deployment of end-to-end monitoring metrics (Prometheus, Grafana, Datadog), log management setups (ELK, Splunk), and automated vulnerability pipeline scanners.
